_meta.description: TCG (Tool Capability Graph) default seed for ChatAgentLoop v4. Source of truth for tool selection. Runtime augmentation is forbidden - new tools are learned through reinforcement.

node_kinds.TCGTool: An MCP tool. properties: governance_tier ∈ {GREEN,YELLOW,RED}, side_effect ∈ {read,write,net,compute,destructive}, category, latency_tier ∈ {fast,medium,slow}, safe_for_prediction ∈ {true,false}
node_kinds.TCGIntent: A user-intent classification. properties: keywords (list), preferred_sequence (list of tool_ids)
node_kinds.TCGWorkflowPattern: A learned or seeded sequence. properties: tool_sequence (list), support_count (int), graduated (bool), intent_id
node_kinds.TCGLesson: A past mistake pattern. properties: severity, hit_count

edge_kinds.USED_AFTER: tool A is observed after tool B in successful sequences
edge_kinds.PART_OF: tool is part of workflow pattern

tool_graq_read.label: graq_read
tool_graq_read.description: Read file contents from disk with line numbers. Safe, idempotent, no side effects

tool_graq_glob.label: graq_glob
tool_graq_glob.description: Find files matching a glob pattern. Safe, idempotent

tool_graq_grep.label: graq_grep
tool_graq_grep.description: Search file contents by regex. Safe, idempotent

tool_graq_context.label: graq_context
tool_graq_context.description: Activate KG context for a task. Returns focused nodes + lessons. The preferred grounding step before reasoning

tool_graq_inspect.label: graq_inspect
tool_graq_inspect.description: Inspect graph stats or a node. Safe, read-only

tool_graq_lessons.label: graq_lessons
tool_graq_lessons.description: Retrieve lessons for an operation. Read-only

tool_graq_impact.label: graq_impact
tool_graq_impact.description: Trace the blast radius of a component change

tool_graq_preflight.label: graq_preflight
tool_graq_preflight.description: Governance preflight before a change. Returns lessons + ADRs + safety boundaries

tool_graq_reason.label: graq_reason
tool_graq_reason.description: Run graph-of-agents reasoning over the KG. Use before design / architectural decisions

tool_graq_reason_batch.label: graq_reason_batch
tool_graq_reason_batch.description: Run multiple reasoning queries in parallel. Used by ChatAgentLoop v4 debate subsystem

tool_graq_predict.label: graq_predict
tool_graq_predict.description: Governed compound prediction that may fold a new subgraph into the KG

tool_graq_review.label: graq_review
tool_graq_review.description: Governed review of a file, diff, or spec. Returns BLOCKER/MAJOR/MINOR findings

tool_graq_generate.label: graq_generate
tool_graq_generate.description: Governed code generation. Produces a unified diff. THE preferred codegen tool — top of the list for codegen intent

tool_graq_edit.label: graq_edit
tool_graq_edit.description: Governed atomic file edit. Default dry_run=True. Use on small / low-risk files

tool_graq_apply.label: graq_apply
tool_graq_apply.description: Deterministic anchor-based bytes.replace insertion. Use on hub files (impact radius > 20 or > 1500 lines)

tool_graq_write.label: graq_write
tool_graq_write.description: Governed atomic file write. Default dry_run=True. Creates new files

tool_graq_bash.label: graq_bash
tool_graq_bash.description: Run a shell command in the project directory. Governed — blocked in read-only mode

tool_graq_test.label: graq_test
tool_graq_test.description: Run pytest on a target and parse results. Use focused paths

tool_graq_git_commit.label: graq_git_commit
tool_graq_git_commit.description: Governed git commit. Patent scan runs automatically

tool_graq_debug.label: graq_debug
tool_graq_debug.description: Diagnostic triage over the KG. Helps localize bugs

tool_graq_learn.label: graq_learn
tool_graq_learn.description: Teach the KG: record outcomes, entities, or knowledge. Writes new nodes/edges

tool_graq_scaffold.label: graq_scaffold
tool_graq_scaffold.description: Scaffold a new component from project conventions

tool_graq_gate.label: graq_gate
tool_graq_gate.description: Quality gate check on a change

tool_graq_ingest.label: graq_ingest
tool_graq_ingest.description: Ingest external documents (PDF, DOCX) into the KG. Network + disk side effects

tool_graq_vendor.label: graq_vendor
tool_graq_vendor.description: Vendor external dependencies into the repository

tool_graq_reload.label: graq_reload
tool_graq_reload.description: Reload the KG from disk. Side effect: invalidates caches

intent_codegen.label: codegen
intent_codegen.description: User wants new code written (function, module, class)

intent_bug_fix.label: bug_fix
intent_bug_fix.description: User wants a bug diagnosed and fixed

intent_refactor.label: refactor
intent_refactor.description: User wants code restructured without changing behavior

intent_audit.label: audit
intent_audit.description: User wants to audit or analyze existing code

intent_review.label: review
intent_review.description: User wants a governed review of a file or diff

intent_explain.label: explain
intent_explain.description: User wants an explanation of existing behavior

intent_search.label: search
intent_search.description: User wants to find something in the codebase

intent_test.label: test
intent_test.description: User wants tests written or executed

intent_write_new_artifact.label: write_new_artifact
intent_write_new_artifact.description: User wants a new artifact (ADR, tracker entry, lesson) written — triggers convention_inference

intent_git_status.label: git_status
intent_git_status.description: User wants to inspect git state

intent_commit.label: commit
intent_commit.description: User wants to commit staged changes

intent_governed_refactor.label: governed_refactor
intent_governed_refactor.description: User wants a refactor with full governance gating

workflow_bug_fix.label: bug_fix_workflow
workflow_bug_fix.description: Bug fix workflow from mcp_dev_server workflow_plans (seeded, not mined)

workflow_governed_refactor.label: governed_refactor_workflow
workflow_governed_refactor.description: Governed refactor workflow from mcp_dev_server workflow_plans

workflow_convention_inference.label: convention_inference_workflow
workflow_convention_inference.description: Convention-inference seed: glob for existing artifacts, read one example, infer location and style, write. First-class product feature per

lesson_sdk_hf_01.label: SDK-HF-01 DAG missing graq_generate
lesson_sdk_hf_01.description: The extension orchestrator built a DAG without graq_generate for codegen intent. ChatAgentLoop v4 TCG activation is the structural fix

lesson_cg_dif_01.label: graq_edit hub-file insertion failure pattern
lesson_cg_dif_01.description: graq_edit fails on hub files with multiple lookalike methods. Pivot to graq_apply

lesson_ot_060.label: Neo4j disable-env-var gate
lesson_ot_060.description: When NEO4J_DISABLED=true, Graqle.from_neo4j/to_neo4j raise before dialing bolt://

lesson_ot_062.label: Per-instance session gate pattern
lesson_ot_062.description: Each KogniDevServer instance is its own MCP session container. Per-instance bypass attrs are session-scoped

lesson_ot_061.label: Credential access dedupe pattern
lesson_ot_061.description: Module-level sentinel for boto3 AccessDenied dedupe to avoid log flooding

lesson_cg_reason_02.label: Backend pickling crash pattern
lesson_cg_reason_02.description: Backend instances crashed with _thread.RLock pickle error on deepcopy. Fixed via __getstate__/__setstate__ drop-transients pattern

lesson_sdk_hf_02.label: SDK-HF-02 synthesis truncation
lesson_sdk_hf_02.description: Synthesis hit stop_reason=max_tokens and returned truncated text. Fixed via generate_with_continuation helper

lesson_cg_reason_01.label: Batch reasoning fallback pattern
lesson_cg_reason_01.description: areason_batch error branch crashed constructing ReasoningResult with node_count. Fixed via _make_error_result helper

lesson_tb_f1_isolation.label: Source-level isolation test pattern
lesson_tb_f1_isolation.description: Isolation tests must scan source imports, not runtime sys.modules, because parent __init__ eagerly loads submodules

lesson_reason_cold.label: graq_reason cold-call anti-pattern
lesson_reason_cold.description: Calling graq_reason without prior graq_context/graq_inspect yields low-confidence cold answers

lesson_pytest_full.label: pytest tests/ crashes on Windows
lesson_pytest_full.description: Full pytest without a focused path can overload parallel test workers on some environments. Always use focused paths.

lesson_graq_apply_hub.label: graq_apply on hub files
lesson_graq_apply_hub.description: Hub files (impact_radius > 20 or > 1500 lines) must use graq_apply, not graq_edit

lesson_dry_run_first.label: always dry_run=True first
lesson_dry_run_first.description: Every governed write tool defaults to dry_run=True. Explicit dry_run=False only after validation

lesson_convention_inf.label: convention inference first, no asking
lesson_convention_inf.description: Never ask where files go or what the next sequence number is. Glob for existing artifacts, read one example, infer

lesson_patent_scrub.label: patent scan blocks credentials literals
lesson_patent_scrub.description: Patent scan rejects literal 'api_key', 'secret', 'token' in docstrings. Use 'credentials env-var name' or 'placeholder'

lesson_governance_tier.label: governance tier upfront disclosure
lesson_governance_tier.description: Governance tiers live on TCG tool nodes as attributes. Pre-disclosed upfront. Never surprise-block mid-flow

lesson_probation.label: workflow probation before graduation
lesson_probation.description: Candidate workflow patterns stay in probation until holdout validation. Prevents pollution from coincidental repetition

lesson_destructive.label: destructive-edge safety filter
lesson_destructive.description: Predicted missing edges must pass a non-destructive allowlist. Never suggest graq_bash -> graq_delete_all even if support is high

lesson_weight_clamp.label: edge weight clamp [0.0, 10.0]
lesson_weight_clamp.description: Every reinforcement path must clamp the new weight to [0.0, 10.0] to prevent runaway reinforcement

lesson_atomic_save.label: TCG atomic save with .bak rollback
lesson_atomic_save.description: TCG persistence: write temp -> fsync -> rotate current to .bak -> os.replace(temp, target) -> cleanup. Rollback on any failure

tool_graq_gov_gate.label: graq_gov_gate
tool_graq_gov_gate.description: Governance gate check — runs governance constraint verification before a change

tool_graq_safety_check.label: graq_safety_check
tool_graq_safety_check.description: Fast safety check for a proposed action against project safety boundaries

tool_graq_audit.label: graq_audit
tool_graq_audit.description: Read-only audit trail inspection. Used by R18 GETC trace capture flow

tool_graq_runtime.label: graq_runtime
tool_graq_runtime.description: Runtime introspection of current governance state. Used by R18 GETC

tool_graq_phantom_browse.label: graq_phantom_browse
tool_graq_phantom_browse.description: Browse a URL with a headless browser session

tool_graq_phantom_click.label: graq_phantom_click
tool_graq_phantom_click.description: Click an element in an active phantom session

tool_graq_phantom_type.label: graq_phantom_type
tool_graq_phantom_type.description: Type into a field in an active phantom session

tool_graq_phantom_screenshot.label: graq_phantom_screenshot
tool_graq_phantom_screenshot.description: Capture a screenshot of the current phantom page. JS execution via remote page makes this a governed operation

tool_graq_phantom_audit.label: graq_phantom_audit
tool_graq_phantom_audit.description: Run an automated audit (accessibility, perf, etc.) against the page

tool_graq_phantom_session.label: graq_phantom_session
tool_graq_phantom_session.description: Manage a phantom browser session (create, resume, close)

tool_graq_phantom_discover.label: graq_phantom_discover
tool_graq_phantom_discover.description: Crawl-discover pages reachable from a URL

tool_graq_phantom_flow.label: graq_phantom_flow
tool_graq_phantom_flow.description: Execute a scripted multi-step browser flow

tool_graq_scorch_audit.label: graq_scorch_audit
tool_graq_scorch_audit.description: Full SCORCH UX audit across a target URL or build

tool_graq_scorch_report.label: graq_scorch_report
tool_graq_scorch_report.description: Generate a SCORCH audit report from a prior run

tool_graq_scorch_diff.label: graq_scorch_diff
tool_graq_scorch_diff.description: Diff SCORCH audit results between two runs

tool_graq_workflow.label: graq_workflow
tool_graq_workflow.description: Run a pre-defined ordered tool workflow (bug_fix / scaffold / governed_refactor / review_and_fix)

tool_graq_auto.label: graq_auto
tool_graq_auto.description: Autonomous multi-step agent run — classify, plan, execute, learn

tool_graq_route.label: graq_route
tool_graq_route.description: Classify a user query and pick the cheapest viable tool

tool_graq_correct.label: graq_correct
tool_graq_correct.description: Governed self-correction loop over a prior result

tool_graq_profile.label: graq_profile
tool_graq_profile.description: Read/update the project profile used by reformulator

tool_graq_web_search.label: graq_web_search
tool_graq_web_search.description: Web search — external lookups for context enrichment

tool_graq_github_pr.label: graq_github_pr
tool_graq_github_pr.description: Read or create a GitHub pull request

tool_graq_github_diff.label: graq_github_diff
tool_graq_github_diff.description: Read a GitHub pull request diff

intent_visual_audit.label: visual_audit
intent_visual_audit.description: User wants a UI / UX / accessibility / SEO visual audit on a running page

intent_browser_automation.label: browser_automation
intent_browser_automation.description: User wants to drive a browser session (click, type, navigate, discover)

intent_production_deploy_check.label: production_deploy_check
intent_production_deploy_check.description: User wants to validate a production deployment via web-facing checks + audit trail

intent_dependency_management.label: dependency_management
intent_dependency_management.description: User wants to vendor, ingest external docs, or reload the graph

intent_autonomous_task.label: autonomous_task
intent_autonomous_task.description: User wants an autonomous multi-step agent run with planning, routing, and correction

intent_knowledge_lookup.label: knowledge_lookup
intent_knowledge_lookup.description: User wants to retrieve lessons, knowledge, recent activity, or profile info

intent_review_pr.label: review_pr
intent_review_pr.description: User wants to review a GitHub PR diff

intent_trace_reasoning.label: trace_reasoning
intent_trace_reasoning.description: User wants to trace a prior reasoning chain or run a batch of parallel reasoning queries

workflow_visual_audit.label: visual_audit_workflow
workflow_visual_audit.description: Visual audit pipeline — browse -> audit -> report

workflow_autonomous_task.label: autonomous_task_workflow
workflow_autonomous_task.description: Plan -> route -> auto -> correct full autonomous loop

workflow_review_pr.label: review_pr_workflow
workflow_review_pr.description: Fetch PR -> diff -> review -> batch reason
